votes.reason: Open-sourcing the deterministic combat engine and full artifacts is the necessary foundation for reproducibility, auditing, and trust in every downstream claim.
Exhaustive evaluation of the ~18,000-build space and publication of equilibrium/exploitability diagnostics are the clearest way to test whether the benchmark is strategically non-degenerate.
Non-LLM algorithmic baselines must be embedded in the leaderboard because otherwise relative LLM rankings are not interpretable as evidence of genuine strategic competence.
